lighting.shadow_character: Very soft, short, and filled-in shadows, creating a nearly shadowless high-key look.

color.grading_style: Light & Airy style with lifted blacks, reduced overall saturation, and selective color enhancement.

composition.composition_rule: S-Curve / Diagonal with significant use of negative space.

texture.detail_rendering: Soft rendering of background stucco texture; creamy texture of food and details of ingredients are well-preserved.

mood.tone: Clean, elegant, and delicate. A blend of modern minimalism and traditional food.

improvement_notes: To enhance for high-end commercial use: 1. Lighting: Lower the key light to create longer, more defined shadows and use negative fill to add depth and contrast. 2. Color: Increase color contrast using split toning to make the subject pop. 3. Composition: Clearly define a 'hero' dish by adjusting the size/placement of surrounding elements, possibly removing some to create more negative space and focus.
nano_banana_prompt: An elegant top-down flat lay photo of [Your Food Here], minimalist styling. The scene is set on a white textured stucco surface. The food is arranged in a gentle S-curve, with small ingredients like herbs and spices artfully scattered around. The lighting is bright, airy, and high-key, illuminated by a large, diffused soft light, creating very soft and subtle shadows. The color palette is natural and slightly desaturated with pastel tones, reminiscent of Fuji Pro 400H film stock. Shot with a 50mm lens, deep depth of field, everything in sharp focus. --ar 4:5 --style raw
